rationale: Review 1's approve is correct and leads to the better merged PR. Review 2's two findings are not real attribution issues (the docstring already names the sole direct import+instance source for the whole file's purpose; the antipode_comp helper and Bialgebra.TensorProduct re-exports are routine uses of already-imported Mathlib APIs, not copied techniques needing extra credits), so acting on them adds only needless pedantic edits.
